result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  webben [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                       Enable verbose output
  -e, --export-format <Default|Json>  Export format [default: Default]
  --version                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

Commands:
  config <fileInfo>
  uri <uri>
  analyse, analyze <uri>

  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

Commands:

  analyse, analyze <uri>

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  webben config <fileInfo> [options]

Arguments:
  <fileInfo>  The file to read the configuration from

Options:
  -v, --verbose                       Enable verbose output
  -e, --export-format <Default|Json>  Export format [default: Default]
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  webben uri <uri> [options]

Arguments:
  <uri>  The URI to use.

Options:
  -f, --fetch-content                  Whether to fetch the content of the URI.
  -l, --name <name>                    Name or label of current test
  -n, --request-count <request-count>  The number of requests to make.
  -r, --allow-redirect                 Whether to allow redirects.
  -p, --parallelism <parallelism>      The number of parallelism to use.
  -t, --timeout-in-ms <timeout-in-ms>  The bounded capacity to use.
  -v, --verbose                        Enable verbose output
  -e, --export-format <Default|Json>   Export format [default: Default]
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
